name: Fearweed
description:
Activate 1 Interact

Cultivated by mashing and fermenting toxic weeds found in lonely graveyards, fearweed is a greenish paste magically infused with psychic horror. The condition from fearweed can't be removed while the poison lasts.

Saving Throw

Onset 1 minute

Maximum Duration 6 minutes

Stage 1 ] damage and frightened 1 (1 minute)

Stage 2 ] damage and Frightened 2 (1 minute)

Stage 3 ] damage and Frightened 3 (1 minute)

Craft Requirements Supply one casting of 4th-rank .
